title: Kanban board keyboard navigation
excerpt:

posts.author: victork (Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems there are no keyboard navigation shortcuts for the Kanban view. I’d like to request that.
Our team comes from the Shortcut app and that was a very useful thing to have. For instance, we can’t move between tasks in a column without closing the task first.
Having the ability to navigate between opened tasks with the left and right arrows would be a great start.
Having further available shortcuts (no pun intended, possibly being inspired by Shortcut’s?) would be even better. It’s also a more accessible system that way.
